author: mark
text: Drop 'command: release-plz' from .github/workflows/release-plz.yml. Root cause of no Release PR / no publish: the valid values for the action's command input are empty, 'release-pr', or 'release'. Setting it to 'release-plz' makes both branches of the action's shell script false, so it prints 'Using forge github' and exits in <1s without running release-plz. Removing the line makes it default to empty, which runs both release-pr and release. 2-line diff, pre-commit green.
